name: read_bcf
signature: read_bcf(path, region := NULL, index_path := NULL, tidy_format := FALSE)
description: Read VCF and BCF variant data with typed INFO, FORMAT, and optional tidy sample output.
examples: SELECT CHROM, POS, REF, ALT FROM read_bcf('vcf_file.bcf') LIMIT 5;

name: read_bam
signature: read_bam(path, standard_tags := FALSE, auxiliary_tags := FALSE, region := NULL, index_path := NULL, reference := NULL)
description: Read SAM, BAM, and CRAM alignments with optional typed SAMtags and auxiliary tag maps.
examples: SELECT QNAME, FLAG, RNAME, POS FROM read_bam('range.bam') LIMIT 5;

name: read_fasta
description: Read FASTA records or indexed FASTA regions as sequence rows.

name: read_fastq
description: Read single-end, paired-end, or interleaved FASTQ files.
examples: SELECT NAME, MATE FROM read_fastq('r1.fq', mate_path := 'r2.fq') LIMIT 5;

name: read_gff
signature: read_gff(path, header_names := NULL, header := FALSE, column_types := NULL, auto_detect := FALSE, attributes_map := FALSE, region := NULL, index_path := NULL)
description: Read GFF annotations with optional parsed attribute maps and indexed region filtering.
examples: SELECT seqname, feature, start, "end" FROM read_gff('gff_file.gff.gz') LIMIT 5;

name: read_gtf
signature: read_gtf(path, header_names := NULL, header := FALSE, column_types := NULL, auto_detect := FALSE, attributes_map := FALSE, region := NULL, index_path := NULL)
description: Read GTF annotations with optional parsed attribute maps and indexed region filtering.
examples: SELECT seqname, feature, start, "end" FROM read_gtf('annotations.gtf.gz') LIMIT 5;

name: read_tabix
signature: read_tabix(path, header_names := NULL, header := FALSE, column_types := NULL, auto_detect := FALSE, attributes_map := FALSE, region := NULL, index_path := NULL)
description: Read generic tabix-indexed text data with optional header handling and type inference.

name: fasta_index
description: Build a FASTA index and return the index path used by the operation.

name: read_hts_header
description: Inspect HTS headers in parsed, raw, or combined form across supported formats.
examples: SELECT record_type, id FROM read_hts_header('formatcols.vcf.gz') LIMIT 10;

name: read_hts_index
description: Inspect high-level HTS index metadata such as sequence names and mapped counts.

name: read_hts_index_spans
description: Expand index metadata into span and chunk rows suitable for low-level index inspection.
examples: SELECT seqname, chunk_beg_vo, chunk_end_vo FROM read_hts_index_spans('vcf_file.bcf') LIMIT 5;

name: read_hts_index_raw
description: Return the raw on-disk HTS index blob together with basic identifying metadata.

name: seq_revcomp
description: Compute the reverse complement of a DNA sequence using A, C, G, T, and N bases.

name: seq_canonical
description: Return the lexicographically smaller of a sequence and its reverse complement.

name: seq_hash_2bit
description: Encode a short DNA sequence as a 2-bit unsigned integer hash.

name: seq_encode_4bit
description: Encode an IUPAC DNA sequence as a list of 4-bit base codes, preserving ambiguity symbols including N.

name: seq_decode_4bit
description: Decode a list of 4-bit IUPAC DNA base codes back into a sequence string.

name: seq_gc_content
description: Compute GC fraction for a DNA sequence as a value between 0 and 1.

name: seq_kmers
description: Expand a sequence into positional k-mers with optional canonicalization.

name: is_segmented
description: Test whether the SAM flag marks a read as part of a segmented template.

name: is_properly_aligned
description: Test whether the SAM flag indicates a properly aligned read pair.

name: is_properly_segmented
description: Alias for is_properly_aligned(flag) using segmented-read terminology.

name: is_unmapped
description: Test whether the read itself is unmapped according to the SAM flag.

name: is_mate_unmapped
description: Test whether the mate read is flagged as unmapped.

name: is_reverse_complemented
description: Test whether the read is aligned to the reverse strand.

name: is_mate_reverse_complemented
description: Test whether the mate read is aligned to the reverse strand.

name: is_first_segment
description: Test whether the read is marked as the first segment in the template.

name: is_last_segment
description: Test whether the read is marked as the last segment in the template.

name: is_secondary
description: Test whether the alignment is marked as secondary.

name: is_qc_fail
description: Test whether the read failed vendor or pipeline quality checks.

name: is_duplicate
description: Test whether the alignment is flagged as a duplicate.

name: is_supplementary
description: Test whether the alignment is marked as supplementary.
